creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2008-09-23 09:06:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ftp/ncftpd           Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    ftp/ncftpd/files     ncftpd.sh.in pkg-message.in 
  Removed files:
    ftp/ncftpd           pkg-message 
    ftp/ncftpd/scripts   ncftpd.sh 
  Log:
  - Update to 2.8.5
  - Add amd64 support for 6.x and 7.x
  - Remove 5.x support
  - Update startup script to rcNG
  - Fix docs handling
  - Cleanup and tweaks
  
  PR:             ports/127527
  Submitted by:   OH Changsun <oh@xbsd.kr>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.21      +28 -18    ports/ftp/ncftpd/Makefile
